text:
Sommy (ソミー, Somī) is examinee #118 during the 287th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 23 He travels everywhere with his trained pet monkey. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 25 

Appearance

Sommy is a tall and slender man, with brown messy hair and thick eyebrows. He wears a black long-sleeved shirt with tan pants and is often seen with his monkey hanging onto him.

Personality

Sommy is a sly man and is not against using tricks to achieve his goals. He is also condescending, calling Leorio unintelligent when he fell into his and Tonpa's trap.

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Sommy is one of the 24 candidates who pass Lippo's 3rd Phase in the Trick Tower and reach the 4th Phase of the exam on Zevil Island. During the 4th Phase of the exam, Sommy proves to be a rather unscrupulous character as he and his monkey ambush Leorio from behind and manage to steal his badge. It's revealed that Sommy partnered up with Tonpa in order to steal Leorio's badge as Tonpa's real target was, in fact, Leorio. In order to trick Leorio Sommy traded the badge number sheets with Tonpa in order to deceive him. 

Sommy disparages Leorio's intelligence and furious by the outcome, Leorio chases after Tonpa, as Sommy escapes by climbing a tree branch. Leorio and Kurapika later find Sommy and his monkey to retake Leorio's badge and also the monkey tamer's own badge making him fail the exam in the process. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 26 

Greed Island arc

Sommy attends the 288th Hunter Exam, but is knocked unconscious by Killua in the preliminary phase and again fails to become a Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 148 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 1999 anime adaptation, Sommy's monkey is named Kamuri (カムリ, Kamuri). Hunter × Hunter - Episode 19 (1999) 
In Nippon Animation's anime adaptation, Sommy's monkey betrays him and shows Kurapika where the badge was hidden. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 22 (1999) 
In the Madhouse Animation's anime adaptation, Sommy is mistakenly shown with badge #115 rather than badge #118 in some scenes. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 3 (2011)
